hero.description: We provide basic IT skills for students with learning difficulties.

m1.title: 🖥️ Computer Basics
m1.desc: Learn basic operations and get familiar with computers.

m2.title: 🔒 Internet & Safety
m2.desc: Explore the online world safely and responsibly.

m4.title: 🎮 Coding Games
m4.desc: Develop logical thinking with simple coding games.

goals.title: Project Goals
goals.desc: Aims to increase students' participation in social life, boost their self-confidence, and support digital literacy.
goals.subtitle: Main Objectives

c1.title: 🎯 Confidence Building
c1.desc: Help students feel safe and confident in the digital world.

c2.title: 💻 Digital Literacy
c2.desc: Understand and use today's technology effectively.

c3.title: 🌍 Social Participation
c3.desc: Increase students' active participation in social life.

c4.title: 🚀 Career Readiness
c4.desc: Teach basic IT skills used in the workplace.
